notes:
Multifunction device (copier/scanner/fax/etc).

To get its maximum quality, use the HPIJS driver. 600 dpi in colour is not supported by the hardware.

Stand-alone copying should just work, it does not need the PC.

Faxing from and to the PC or PC-controlled copying is not supported.

Consumables/Refills: 2 Cartridges: Color (CMY) and Black
